heading: Effective date
label: 2706 Effective date
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this subtitle” meaning subtitle A (§§ 211–218) of title II of which enacted this chapter, amended , repealed , and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 1202, 1319, 2251, and 2703 of this title and , Navigation and Navigable Waters. For complete classification of subtitle A to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 98–67section 1202 of this titlesection 2582 of this titlesection 1311 of Title 33

Amendments1990—Subsec. (b). struck out subsec. (b) which related to termination of duty-free treatment. Notwithstanding directory language repealing “section 218 of the Caribbean Basin Economic Recovery Act ()”, amendment was executed by repealing subsec. (b) to reflect the probable intent of Congress in view of catchline for which read “Repeal of termination date on duty-free treatment under the Act”.Pub. L. 101–38219 U.S.C. 2706(b)section 211 of Pub. L. 101–382
